name: adult small & mini chicken & barley entrée dog food
description: hill's science diet adult small & mini chicken & barley entrée dog food is tailored nutrition for the unique needs of small & mini dogs during the prime of their life. adult small & toy breed dog food provides precisely balanced nutrition for small dogs between 1 – 6 years old high-quality protein for lean muscles made with purposeful ingredients for a flavorful, nutritious meal easy to digest big on love, small in size
